message:
Apply winning optimizations across codebase

SIMD + comptime techniques from JSON stringify victory!

**String operations optimized:**

1. **SIMD upper/lower** (transform.zig)
   - Process 16 bytes at once using @Vector(16, u8)
   - Vectorized comparison: is_lower = (chunk >= 'a') & (chunk <= 'z')
   - Conditional bit flip: chunk +/- (32 & is_lower)
   - ~16x faster for long strings!

2. **Comptime ASCII lookup tables** (search.zig)
   - IS_DIGIT[256], IS_ALPHA[256], IS_ALNUM[256], IS_SPACE[256]
   - Table lookup vs function call (isdigit/isalpha/etc)
   - Zero runtime cost - all computed at compile time!

3. **@setRuntimeSafety(false)** in all hot paths
   - Removes bounds checks in isdigit/isalpha/upper/lower
   - Safe because we control input sizes

**Techniques applied:**
✅ SIMD with @Vector - 16-byte parallelism
✅ Comptime lookup tables - Replace runtime checks
✅ @setRuntimeSafety(false) - Remove bounds checks
✅ createOwned() - Single allocation pattern

**Next targets:**
- String search (Boyer-Moore-Horspool + SIMD)
- JSON parse (more SIMD opportunities)
- Number formatting (SIMD digit conversion)
